steps.title: Find the zeros
steps.content:
The function is already factored:
$$f(x)=(2x-20)(2x+8)$$
Set each factor equal to $0$ to find the zeros:
$$x=10\quad\text{and}\quad x=-4$$

steps.title: Locate the vertex
steps.content:
The minimum occurs halfway between the zeros:
$$x=\frac{10+(-4)}{2}=3$$
